Manitoba's Strongest

Jul 11, 2026 •

Preamble

The heaviest showdown in Manitoba returns JULY 11 at Iron Image.  Big lifts. Brutal events. Cash prizes.

If you’re feeling weak, you should probably stay home.

Whether you’re chasing the biggest title in Manitoba, testing yourself against the best in the province, or just coming to make a statement, THIS IS IT.

  • CASH PRIZES - Iron Image Barbell Club - Saturday, July 11 - Registration closes MAY 21 at MIDNIGHT

Sign up now through the link in our bio or at ironimage.ca

For questions or sponsorship opportunities, contact @tompachal tom@ironimage.ca

Location

Iron Image, Selkirk

Events

Events

  • The Big Bench
    max reps, no time limit
    Women: 155 lb
    Men: 305 lb
  • Frame to Yoke
    50 ft / 50 ft, 75 s time limit
    Women: 365 & 455 lb
    Men: 635 & 725 lb
  • Monster Bar Deadlift
    max reps, 60 s time limit
    Women: 375 lb
    Men: 605 lb
  • Arm Over Arm Pull
    50 ft, 75 s time limit
    Women: truck & trailer
    Men: truck, trailer, & tractor
  • Chuck Walk
